source.redaction_reason: The raw tool call obtains authorized Main Hub connection credentials from an earlier private session record. This artifact retains the target, read-only controls, SQL and output hashes, call identities, timestamps, and result without republishing credentials.

execution.target: live Main Hub riverside_os PostgreSQL database
execution.transport: authorized WinRM session to Main Hub followed by local PostgreSQL psql execution on the Main Hub

query.transfer: The exact local SQL file bytes were base64-encoded, written to a temporary Main Hub file, executed by psql in CSV mode, and removed in a finally block.

evidence_limit: The local Codex transcript is append-only evidence of the production read and result, but it is not a database-signed attestation. The retained CSV hash proves the checked artifact bytes; the production database remains the source of the observed state at execution time.
